title: OLinear: A Linear Model for Time Series Forecasting in Orthogonally Transformed Domain

repos.name: jackyue1994__OLinear
repos.evidence: README.md line 3: 'The repo is the official implementation for the paper: OLinear: A Linear Model for Time Series Forecasting in Orthogonally Transformed Domain.' — exact title match. Repo owner 'jackyue1994' matches lead author Wenzhen Yue (yuewenzhen@stu.pku.edu.cn); paper states official code at https://github.com/jackyue1994/OLinear. Both named core contributions are implemented: NormLin in layers/newLinear.py:27 (F.normalize(F.softplus(weight_mat), p=1, dim=-1) = Softplus + row-wise L1 norm, matching paper's NormLin description), OrthoTrans in model/OLinear.py (orthogonal transformation via precomputed Q matrices) with dataset/Generate_corrmat.ipynb generating Pearson-correlation Q matrices. model/OLinear.py and model/OLinear_C.py are the headline models; scripts/OLinear/* reproduce the experiments.

rationale: The single cloned repo is unambiguously THIS paper's own core implementation. README explicitly declares official implementation with the exact paper title; repo owner (jackyue1994) maps to lead author Wenzhen Yue; the paper's own code URL points to this exact repo (github.com/jackyue1994/OLinear). The two distinctive named contributions are present and faithful: NormLin (Softplus + L1 row-normalized weight matrix) in layers/newLinear.py, and OrthoTrans (orthogonal transform from temporal Pearson correlation matrix) in model/OLinear.py + dataset/Generate_corrmat.ipynb. No baseline/dependency/different-paper repos were cloned (the only non-cloned link, liyaguang/DCRNN, was correctly excluded). The code_links.txt [author-cue] prior is confirmed.
audit_impact: None. The audit correctly treats this repo as 'the official implementation of OLinear' and writes all five findings against the genuine core (requirements unpinned, Q-matrix regeneration friction, no multi-seed std harness, hardcoded cuda:0 device bug, inactive test-stage/batch-size selection). These are legitimate reproducibility/bug findings against real author code; none are misattributed-clone artifacts and there is no 'no code released' assertion to flip.
recommended_action: No change. Source-present is justified and findings are correctly scoped to the author's own OLinear implementation. Keep paper as correctly classified (source-present).
